update jsh_contract
contract_no = #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contract_name = #{contractName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
organ_id = #{organId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sign_date = #{signDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
effect_date = #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expire_date = #{expireDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
attachments = #{attachments,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
project_name = #{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tonnage = #{tonnage,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
audit_status = #{auditStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sign_status = #{signStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update jsh_contract set contract_no = #{contractNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, contract_name = #{contractName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, organ_id = #{organId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sign_date = #{signDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, effect_date = #{effectDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, expire_date = #{expireDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, amount = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attachments = #{attachments,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, project_name = #{projectName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tonnage = #{tonnage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, audit_status = #{auditStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sign_status = #{signStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
